title: Get Brand Identity Request
description: Request brand identity data from a brand agent. Returns richer, more dynamic, or access-controlled data than static brand.json. Response depth depends on the caller's authorization level — linked accounts get full assets, voice configs, and rights availability.

brand_id.description: Brand identifier from brand.json brands array

fields.description: Specific identity sections to return. Use ["all"] for everything the caller is authorized to see. Agents may return a subset based on authorization.

use_case.description: Intended use case, so the agent can tailor the response. A 'voice' use case returns voice configs; a 'likeness' use case returns high-res photos and appearance guidelines.
